    **I Am Maximus has won the Randox Grand National, regaining the National title in a thrilling competition.**
    ## Context / Background
    The Randox Grand National is one of the most prestigious horse racing events in the world, attracting millions of viewers and bettors. This year's event was highly anticipated, with several top contenders vying for the top spot.
